downshiftProof: route-local because this slice only documents a sanitized local-to-upstream testnet attempt and the observed 502 blocker. It does not commit secrets, rerun live execution, publish packages, or change runtime behavior.

notes: No transaction digest was produced. The next live slice should inspect upstream Gas Station health/logs, sponsor funding/key validity, IOTA RPC connectivity, and reserve request compatibility before retrying.
